title: SpawnerLoader9000
description: Loads your spawner even if you're far away.
body:
<center>
  
  ![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?url=https%3A%2F%2Fapi.modrinth.com%2Fv2%2Fproject%2Fsl9k&query=downloads&suffix=%20&style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=10DD10&logoSize=auto&label=Modrinth%20Downloads&labelColor=101010&color=242424)

  ![Requires Polymer](https://img.shields.io/badge/suggests_polymer-black?style=for-the-badge&logo=data%3Aimage%2Fsvg%2Bxml%3Bbase64%2CPHN2ZyB4bWxucz0iaHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMjAwMC9zdmciIHdpZHRoPSIzMiIgaGVpZ2h0PSIzMiI%2BPHBhdGggZD0iTTAgMGgzMnYzMkgwWiIgZmlsbD0iI0Y2RTBBNiIvPjxwYXRoIGQ9Ik0xMSAzaDEwdjJoNnY2aDJ2MTBoLTJ2MmgtMnYtMmgtMnYtOGgtMnYyaC0ydjJoLTJ2MmgtMnYyaC0ydjJoLTJ2Mkg5djJIN3YySDN2LTRoMnYtMmgydi0yaDJ2LTJoMnYtMmgydi0yaDJ2LTJoMnYtMmgyVjloLThaIiBmaWxsPSIjOTA5REEyIi8%%3D%3D&labelColor=%23f6e0a6&color=%23f6e0a6&link=modrinth.com%2Fmod%2Fpolymer)

  ## SpawnerLoader9000 (SL9K)

  Loads your spawner even when you're far away.

</center>

# Why?
This is specifically useful for spawner farms when you want to move them far away from the spawner!

I got the motivation to create this mod because the mod [Scarecrows' Territory](https://modrinth.com/mod/scarecrows-territory), isn't Vanilla compatible.

# How do I use it?
## First, you need to craft the block.

<details>
<summary>Crafting Recipe</summary>
  <center>
    
![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c08e1ccc9392948942199f67a21d12993c56c2b.png)
  
  </center>

(you can make a suggestion in Github if you think that the recipe is very expensive!)
</details>

## Then, what?
Just place the block on top of a mob spawner and watch the magic happen!

<details>
<summary>Extras!</summary>
<hr>
The block can also load a 3x3 chunk area around itself so the spawned entities dont unload immediately.
<hr>
• This feature only works if the block itself is above a spawner and theres no presence of itself in a 5x5 chunk radius.
<hr>
<details>
<summary>Note!</summary>
Remember that this feature is automatically turned off but, you can enable it by right clicking the block and clicking the item in the middle. (Don't forget to click apply in the bottom right corner of the GUI!) (takes a while to actually load the 3x3 chunk area)
</details>
<hr>
</details>

# Compatibility
This mod should be compatible with all mods (atleast I think it is), feel free to make a [Github Issue](https://github.com/ThatMG393/SpawnerLoader9000/issues) if there's any mod incompatibility issue.

## Vanilla client compatibility
This mod supports Vanilla clients if you install the optional server-side mod, [Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer)! (HUGE THANKS TO PATBOX AND ITS CONTRIBUTORS‼️‼️)

<details>
<summary>Tutorial! (all of this is on the server-side)</summary>
  
  1. Download Polymer and install it in your server 'mods' folder.

  2. Run the Minecraft Server to generate Polymer configs.

  3. Go to `config/polymer`

  4. Open `auto-host.json`

  5. And change the value of `"enabled"` and `"required"` (<- this one is optional) to `true`.

  The config file should now look like this:
  ![Output](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dd2020ad8dc0087049e84f5a4ecc8a7375840dc_0.webp)

### Lastly, save the config and restart your server!
</details>

You can also install Polymer in the client-side for an overall better experience!
